cases.prompt: 우리 프로젝트 코드 구조 점검해줘. 스파게티 코드 있는지 확인해줘.

assertions.text: The agent runs check-circular-deps.sh or madge --circular.
The agent scans for files >500 lines and >300 lines.
The agent verifies no shared/ imports from feature/ (upward dependency check).
The agent produces an actionable checklist of files to refactor with line counts.

cases.prompt: Review our project file organization and recommend improvements

assertions.text: The agent evaluates folder structure against the layered template (features/shared/types/config/adapters).
The agent flags naming convention violations (PascalCase files, camelCase components, etc.).
The agent points to references/architecture-patterns.md for detailed patterns.

cases.prompt: 새 결제 모듈 추가하려는데 어디다 둬야 해?

assertions.text: The agent uses the file placement decision tree.
The agent recommends src/features/billing/ structure with components/services/types subdirectories.
The agent warns against putting domain-specific code in shared/.
